hero.title: Your donation...
hero.description: Ihsan platform ensures that every Ouguiya reaches its beneficiaries with full transparency through live tracking technology.

investigator.title: Investigator Posts a Need
investigator.description: Our field investigators accurately document cases in need.

donor.title: Donor Chooses Funding
donor.description: Browse cases and choose what you want to support directly.

payment.title: Electronic Payment
payment.description: Secure and fast payment methods locally and internationally.

delivery.title: Support is Delivered
delivery.description: Our team ensures that help reaches the target as quickly as possible.

proof.title: Proof of Delivery
proof.description: Documentation with photos and videos for every delivery process.

ledger.title: Transparency Ledger
ledger.description: The transaction automatically appears in the public operations ledger.

targeted.title: Targeted Donations
targeted.description: Ensure your donation goes directly to the case you chose without deductions.

anonymity.title: Asymmetric Anonymity
anonymity.description: We protect your identity completely while providing full transparency on the path of your funds.

impact.title: Proof of Impact
impact.description: Receive documented reports with photos and data as soon as the delivery process is complete.

ledger.title: Public Transparency Ledger
ledger.description: All transactions are recorded in a public, tamper-proof ledger to ensure maximum integrity.
ledger.searchNote: You can search using transaction number or electronic fingerprint

cta.title: Do Good with Excellence
cta.description: Join thousands of donors who place their trust in Ihsan to ensure their giving reaches those in need.

auth.newPasswordSubtitle: Choose a strong password for your account

map.title: Needs by Region
map.description: Track urgent needs across different areas of Nouakchott and contribute directly to meeting them.
